requirements.text: Produce a degradation chart/data file for recall/precision over corpus growth for 20/50/100pct checkpoints, all three arms.
Output data file contains exactly three checkpoints with well-formed metrics for all three arms.
Reuse pipeline.py's run_hivemind_arm/run_vector_rag_arm/run_graphrag_lite_arm wrappers (5.2.4) rather than reimplementing arm execution.
Score via eval.metrics.score_arm against ground truth.
Optional judge-based answer-quality scoring routed through llm_judge.score_arm_answers -> LLMInterceptor.call(), mocked in tests.
compare_precision_across_checkpoints tested at genuine multi-checkpoint (>1) scale in this subtask's own suite.
Write results to a JSON data file, one row per checkpoint per arm, well-formed metrics.
chart.py renders the data file into a degradation chart/table, one line per arm, zero new dependency.
Zero live network calls / .env reads anywhere in this subtask's own test suite.
